name: Chocolate-Chip Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare topping: In a small bowl, mix brown sugar, chopped walnuts, and 1/2 cup semisweet chocolate pieces. Set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 13x9-inch baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour and remaining ingredients except the reserved semisweet chocolate pieces. Mix with a mixer on low speed until combined, constantly scraping the bowl.
4. Increase mixer speed to high and beat for 2 minutes, occasionally scraping the bowl.
5. Stir in the reserved semisweet chocolate pieces and pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Spread topping over the batter.
7. Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center of the cake comes out clean. Cool in the pan on a rack.
